steps.title: Analyze the equation
steps.content: A real square is never negative, yet $$x^2=-841.$$ No real $x$ can satisfy this.

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: There are zero real solutions. That matches choice D — D is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice D is correct. Since the square of a real number is never negative, the given equation isn't true for any real value of $x$. Therefore, the given equation has zero distinct real solutions.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.
